memo_reasons: no artifact-backed original results survived validation
no original result resolved to a real saved artifact

reference_catalog.text: GitHub mirror project describing the BRFSS-derived diabetes indicators dataset. Accession: swimmingbrain/decoding-diabetes. https://github.com/swimmingbrain/decoding-diabetes. Used to verify that the accessible mirrored BRFSS-derived dataset is diabetes-focused and based on a reduced feature set, not obviously suitable for e-cigarette/epilepsy analysis.

CDC BRFSS 2015 annual survey data page. Accession: BRFSS-2015. https://www.cdc.gov/brfss/annual_data/annual_2015.html. Used as contextual provenance that full BRFSS 2015 exists separately from the reduced GitHub diabetes-indicators mirror.

summary: Routing to a research memo because the run did not clear the paper gate.
